import.title: Import brands from Excel
import.subtitle: Upload an Excel (.xlsx) or CSV file exported from Excel to create or update brands in bulk.
import.drop_zone_hint: Drag and drop your file here or browse from your device.
import.do_not_close: Please wait. This may take a while depending on file size.
import.override_hint: If a brand name already exists, update it instead of skipping.
import.dry_run_hint: Validate the file, see the summary, but do not create or update brands.
import.instructions_subtitle: Follow these tips to avoid common formatting issues before you upload.
import.instructions_row1: Each row represents a single brand.
import.instructions_row2: Brand ID is optional for new brands and required for updates.
import.instructions_row3: Set Is Active to true/false to control visibility.
import.instructions_row4: Provide image URLs for the Logo field if available.
import.instructions_row5: Leave optional columns blank if you do not need them.
import.select_file_error: Please select a file to import.
import.summary_with_errors: Some rows could not be processed. Review the details below.
